Id1.text: Footballer, Alan Martin was born on January 1st 1989 and he is a footballer for the Crewe Alexandra FC and for the Aldershot Town F.C.

Id2.text: Alan Martin (footballer), born 1st January 1989, plays for the club, Crewe Alexandra F.C. He has also played for Aldershot Town FC.

Id3.text: Footballer Alan Martin was born on 01/01/1989. plays for Crewe Alexandra F.C and Aldershot Town F.C.
